store/header.bankinvoice.tooltip: Your {paymentSystemName} is working normally. Click {message} or copy the barcode to complete your payment.
store/header.email: Within 5 minutes, you'll receive an email at {userEmail} with all your purchase details.{lineBreak}Remember to check your spam or promotions folder.
store/header.guest-email: Within 5 minutes, you will receive an email at {userEmail} with all your purchase details.{lineBreak}Remember to check your spam or promotions folder.
store/header.reviewing.order.information: We're reviewing your order information and will confirm it in a moment.
store/order.split.n.pickup.n.takeaway: We split your order in {deliveries} shipments{pickups, plural, one {, 1 in-store pickup} other {, # in-store pickups}}{takeaways, plural, one {, and 1 get-it-now product} other {, and # get-it-now products}}. That way, you will receive items that are closer to you faster.
store/order.split.n.pickup.no.takeaway: We split your order in {deliveries} shipments{pickups, plural, one { and 1 in-store pickup} other { and # in-store pickups}}. That way, you will receive items that are closer to you faster.
store/order.split.no.pickup.n.takeaway: We split your order in {deliveries} shipments{takeaways, plural, one { and 1 get-it-now product} other { and # get-it-now products}}. That way, you will receive items that are closer to you faster.
store/order.split.no.pickup.no.takeaway: We split your order in {deliveries} shipments. That way, you will receive items that are closer to you faster.
store/page.title: Order placed
store/pickup.header.title: Pickup
store/shipping.header.title: Shipping
store/summary.pickup.quantity: {pickups, plural, one {, in 1 in-store pickup} other {, split into # in-store pickups}}
store/summary.shipping.quantity: {shippings, plural, one {, in 1 shipment} other {, split into # shipments}}
store/takeaway.header.title: Get it now
store/warnings.delivery.time: The delivery period starts to count when your payment is confirmed
store/warnings.delivery.tracking: A tracking number will be sent to your email when shipping begins
store/warnings.order.split: Your purchase was split into {numOrders} orders because some items were sold by partners. This doesn't affect shipping estimates.
store/warnings.payment.approval: Payment approval may take from 5 minutes to 5 business days
store/warnings.payment.bankInvoice.appro: Payment approval for {paymentSystemName} may take up to 3 business days. If payment isn't completed by the due date, your order will be automatically canceled.
store/warnings.payment.bankInvoice.value: Make a payment of {paymentValue} by the due date using the information below
Make a payment of {paymentValue} by {paymentDueDate} using the information below
store/warnings.pickup.time: The in-store pickup period starts from the moment your payment is confirmed
store/warnings.subscription: Your order includes purchased items and one or more subscriptions
store/order.error.invalid.title: Page not found
store/order.error.invalid.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Go to the homepage.
store/order.error.not-logged-in.title: You don't have permission
store/order.error.not-logged-in.message: You don't have permission to access this page. Log in and try again.
